consent.title: Welcome to AllergiApp
consent.disclaimerShort: AllergiApp helps you communicate your allergies, but does not replace medical advice. Your allergy data is stored locally on your device, and anonymous data may be collected to improve the service. You can use the app without signing up.
consent.termsNote: By continuing you accept Privacy and Terms of Service

report.title: Report a problem
report.infoBanner: AllergiApp is a collaborative platform: restaurants and reviews are entirely managed by the community. Use this report only for real issues (incorrect information, inappropriate content, etc.). The actions we can take are limited because we don't have direct relationships with restaurants.
report.reviewHint: If your experience could help others, consider leaving a review. A respectful and constructive review often helps more than a report.
report.sent: Your report has been sent. We'll review it as soon as possible.

aboutStory.title: Why is it free?
aboutStory.intro: This app was born from personal experience. As someone with food allergies, I've always loved traveling and discovering new cultures through food.
aboutStory.paragraph1: During my travels, I learned that language barriers can turn a dining experience into a moment of anxiety. I started handwriting small cards listing my allergies, then printing them, and discovered how invaluable they were for communicating with waiters and chefs who didn't speak my language.
aboutStory.paragraph2: One simple gesture—showing a card—changed everything. Restaurant staff appreciated the clarity, I felt safer, and I could finally enjoy local cuisine without fear.
aboutStory.paragraph3: I created AllergiApp to bring this solution to anyone who needs it. It's free because traveling and enjoying the world's food should be a right for everyone, not a privilege.
aboutStory.paragraph4: If this app helps even one person enjoy an extra meal while traveling, it will have achieved its purpose.
aboutStory.quoteText: My mission? Make the world more accessible and help people with allergies explore it through food—safely and joyfully.

onboardingLocation.title: Discover places near you
onboardingLocation.description: Turn on location to find restaurants that match your needs nearby. You can always explore the map and search cities without it.

welcome.title: Great to have you here.
welcome.description: AllergiApp is a community of people sharing real experiences to find the right places to eat well, worry-free.

share.title: Share your experiences
share.description: Every review carries the dietary needs of its author — so others know if that experience is truly right for them.
share.reviewText: Super clear allergen card and the waiter looked after me perfectly.
